description:
In the BTCPay Server web interface (Nakamoto Electronics store), create a new payment request with the following details:

- Title: "Invoice #INV-2024-0347 - Custom PCB Assembly"
- Amount: 425.00 USD
- Description: "Custom 6-layer PCB assembly order, 25 units. Includes component sourcing (BOM ref: BOM-2024-0347), SMT placement, AOI inspection, and conformal coating. Lead time: 15 business days. Payment due within 30 days of invoice date."
- Expiry: 30 days from now

The BTCPay Server is open in Firefox at http://localhost/. You are logged in as the store administrator. Navigate to Payment Requests, click 'Create Payment Request', fill in all the fields, and save the payment request.
